help.faq_section_subtitle: Quickly find answers to your questions
help.faq_1_q: How do I connect my WhatsApp Business account?
help.faq_1_a: Go to the Messaging > WhatsApp section, then click "Connect". You will be guided through the Meta Business verification process and the connection of your WhatsApp Business number.
help.faq_2_q: How does the AI agent work?
help.faq_2_a: The AI agent automatically analyzes incoming messages and suggests relevant replies based on your product catalog, conversation history, and the rules you have configured. You can enable or disable it at any time.
help.faq_3_q: Can I manage multiple social accounts?
help.faq_3_a: Yes, Bedones allows you to connect and manage your WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok accounts simultaneously from a single interface. Each platform has its own messaging and comments section.
help.faq_4_q: How do I add members to my team?
help.faq_4_a: From the Members page, click "Add" to invite a collaborator by email. You can assign different roles (Owner, Administrator, Member) with distinct access levels.
help.faq_5_q: How do I change or cancel my subscription?
help.faq_5_a: Go to the Subscription section to view your current plan, switch plans, or manage your payment methods. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
help.faq_6_a: Absolutely. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We are GDPR compliant and never share your data with third parties without your consent. See our privacy policy for more details.
help.legal_mentions_desc: Information about the publisher, hosting, and intellectual property of the Bedones platform.
help.legal_privacy_desc: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data and that of your customers.
help.legal_conditions_desc: Subscription terms, pricing, commitments, and responsibilities related to using the service.
help.support_desc: If you haven't found the answer to your question in our FAQ, our team is here to help. Send us a message and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
help.form_description_placeholder: Describe your issue or request in detail...
help.success_message: Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you shortly.
help.blog_desc: Discover our practical articles on automation, order management, and the best strategies to grow your online business in Africa.
help.legal_section_subtitle: View legal documents related to using Bedones
